subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the blessed Tree! Thy letter was received and, praise be to God, it betokeneth thy vitality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر نشاط و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Manifestation of God as sun, @call to action
